textByHash.01cd19361d86704f9622ca8f9d65388472952910: I'm afraid that I'm trapped here, but I still remember something of this floor of the temple.
textByHash.06c8596c65e4d9c03e3bb82ef9b4819865012ba6: What are you trying to do, kill me?
textByHash.0ece1ef4fef53423d16e02424cda525f39385665: I'm a civilised man, not a barbarian gnawing on his kill!
textByHash.139e20862de5d6e775ba5cd5cebc00554938db90: My son loved this dish. He would have eaten it every day if we had let him.
textByHash.14405e3ec3a5b653fec59e7e32276d4175a58a2d: I tried to go in there, but the smoke was so thick I could barely see the furnace.
textByHash.27b9d1341f82718bf15e4220fe6b9e91b20043f8: Oh, you may look human, but I know you're not. I've heard stories.
textByHash.285e22821a11796149ecefe94a91222c318c6b09: What do you take me for? A goat who'll eat whatever's in front of him?
textByHash.2b498c7c4831fd24a1ed7a634acbe6a0d477d87c: What do you take me for? A rabbit?
textByHash.3417929be0ce92d0f1ffc7ee360eacbb2dfd0bc7: So, you're throwing scraps of food to me like I'm a dog, are you?
textByHash.36efa83cd96402c95c2fa33f9bd14ab4b0f486b8: What are you trying to feed me? I don't want that!
textByHash.3710ccb1f54eb6065793cd6563586cac04777404: I'm hungry, but not so hungry that I'll eat your leftovers.
textByHash.3acfc9cb204997bf9b8e75c3420b79c047cdf010: The food you gave me healed my wounds, and it also reminded me of my family; that helped me to remember who I was.
textByHash.3dab6ec1977eed0ca2b36db3b4db7aaf3593ff6f: Oh, how pleasant. I'm surprised you remembered to cook it after you killed it!
textByHash.4181221f551bcb3d83fc3e3b3d2554a61e6e81ac: Are you just trying to feed me everything you have?
textByHash.60de9b690b462ad460ac8b44b9fea84fe8a8ff3b: If you need any hints about the rooms nearby, I can give you some help.
textByHash.636447ad94efd34252cc9cc638364940d10218c9: So many years gone by. My children must have grown up and left home.
textByHash.6619c060b3a09cf3a978cbc7e267a1195badaa4e: I haven't remembered them in so long... thank you for reminding me of them.
textByHash.70804f9add6997b1a3d94f524d4396540596de54: I'm not going to eat something your cat dragged in!
textByHash.730978f6c62e842b8cd96e8ed70081e6cc9e957d: I haven't remembered her in so long... thank you for reminding me of her.
textByHash.75ca3e134f0786c84249500301689446b884f69b: My guess is that some sort of magic is keeping it that way.
textByHash.761a44edecd36fc0136503442632ee6c6370d4c0: I might have enjoyed that food if you hadn't already eaten part of it.
textByHash.7d2b0b87acdc64b9ee6734deaa69c1a24b092e94: What's this? Did you just dig it out of the ground?
textByHash.7daef95c01dfa51a1a3c6d40266f73a4dfc7400c: It doesn't look good at all.
textByHash.7e102342d879f6d98adc9df849e7cf5046ad3d32: When we came to the temple, that fountain was frosted with ice.
textByHash.7ec123a8931528808f916fdd31ce4af27d10b1d2: I'd imagine they've gone out by now.
textByHash.89e99e9e9d1f3fb8fa6b379e1ed14f7071bcc164: What do you think I am, a bear? It's not even seasoned!
textByHash.8c4ccad1ecbf2c2188800f6b85a2e4bf5f5755c8: You'll never get what you want from me. I'm a soldier of Avarrocka, and will stand strong!
textByHash.925311f743b1746023695668a34cf356d16aae14: If only you could feel the bite of my sword!
textByHash.988e97be9df65f8e9948212c442bbb7aab6ba3f3: A cake? There's nothing to celebrate, is there?
textByHash.9c4de175be20a83b6f1e3112ae3cbaab5fc10ee7: There seemed to be fires of some sort all around the room, but they were burning low.
textByHash.b2be7f30116873f1121a1b5275c4d88258eefcef: Have you come to torture me again?
textByHash.b56028d9f48888f69e7f73909a368c7a24169abd: I'd rather have some good human home baking.
textByHash.b59ec4728d7ca3642b82156127da480f861c2e3f: It could almost be my wife's wonderful cooking.
textByHash.b74a2d49e81c9c1c48a36a851227d8acacc5ea64: A good breeze should do the trick.
textByHash.b7b5eb3055b8fc3e7fb224b160e2fd58acede53e: Do you think I'm a gnome, or something? I'm not going to eat that!
textByHash.bde29f6e3859bc6f69327543cd9732d0464e9fa4: Did you just dig that up and throw it into an oven?
textByHash.c04baf99908bbd2dc9624da6aad569ffb4ccd597: That doesn't look too bad at all.
textByHash.c97b489c67a3bf5c0847e494b7aae55668fc94ff: I never went in there myself, but I peered through the door.
textByHash.d454d738fd892402be0bb7ac21fa6861dd8025d1: It may be that it's blocked, in which case you'll have to clear it out.
textByHash.d584e94f17288e8efe162e794de96510169cd071: I'd like to have a hearty meal fresh from the oven.
textByHash.d82ace14a4a4b07092651ab5e55e6abef68f74d3: Some fresh home baking would be delicious.
textByHash.d849318d7954ce5d3feb5e0a3876d982287b0732: I'd like something that's had some care put into making it.
textByHash.dc36bac0743ed73577b583f12853f01b27c61920: Even chipping at it with swords or lighting fires under it didn't do anything.
textByHash.dc7cf3f99ba98411dc72c1b67ebcc349a2645ed0: That's revolting! Why would you give people food you've already eaten half of?
textByHash.e14cd0979ef070aa9991b9e35bb65080914682cc: Oh, I get it, you're experimenting on me with different things to see what I'll eat.
textByHash.e9c5a4e8e7ae587bf17a4a730366cce8599d2306: Besides, I am already wounded, and have been so for many years, thanks to this spell you cast on me. And hungry. So very, very hungry.
textByHash.eb0f0efd9ebf50c0b2241f5a7c0ac9a5ca898ee5: My daughter was learning to cook this when I left.
textByHash.f0271651f1e8da18b116ee7b006e7370a3a5a952: I haven't remembered him in so long... thank you for reminding me of him.
textByHash.f16e0177755a66d892d58225b96dd105b9e978b4: How you Mahjarrat can take on any form, and use magic to inflict pain without any weapons.
textByHash.fe5fb2c71f61e9d826ca6a54f9fbce8503d61407: I'd prefer it with some sort of topping...
